name: The Rusty Longsword
short_description: Join Rana, a cute gnome, on a whimsical adventure up a magical island in this enchanting 3D pixel art game. Meet new friends, collect treasures, and unlock secrets along the way!
detailed_description: In this charming pixel art 3D game, join Rana the gnome on a whimsical adventure up an island filled with wonder and surprises. Meet new friends, collect treasures and discover the secrets of the island. As you travel higher, the challenges become tougher, but with Rana's determination and your help, nothing can stop him from reaching the summit. Explore a vibrant world, solve puzzles, and experience the heartwarming story of Rana's journey. Embark on a memorable journey with Rana in this delightful fantasy game.
about_the_game: In this charming pixel art 3D game, join Rana the gnome on a whimsical adventure up an island filled with wonder and surprises. Meet new friends, collect treasures and discover the secrets of the island. As you travel higher, the challenges become tougher, but with Rana's determination and your help, nothing can stop him from reaching the summit. Explore a vibrant world, solve puzzles, and experience the heartwarming story of Rana's journey. Embark on a memorable journey with Rana in this delightful fantasy game.
